nodes.label: Sprite Game Asset Tool Design Spec
nodes.norm_label: sprite game asset tool design spec

nodes.label: Two-Tier Local Architecture
nodes.rationale: Hard line between AI layer (non-deterministic Gemini) and pipeline layer (deterministic pure Python). Pipeline never calls Gemini; only transforms images.

nodes.label: Pipeline Layer
nodes.rationale: Pure Image→Image functions testable with fixed input PNGs; no network, no I/O, no config reads.

nodes.label: Gemini Client Isolation
nodes.rationale: gemini_client.py is the only module importing the Gemini SDK so swapping AI provider later touches one file.

nodes.label: Stage 1 Static Sprite
nodes.rationale: Foundation milestone: describe → clean sprite → export; shippable on its own.

nodes.label: Stage 2 Animation
nodes.rationale: Motion is the moat; static alone is too small. Animated sprite → sheet + atlas with regenerate cleanup.

nodes.label: Base-Anchored Editing
nodes.rationale: Every frame passes the original base sprite plus a per-frame prompt; anchoring to one reference each call beats chaining frame→frame which drifts.

nodes.label: Shared Bounding Box Alignment
nodes.rationale: One bounding box covering every frame so the character does not jitter or resize between frames; deterministic and testable.

nodes.label: Regenerate-Per-Frame Escape Hatch
nodes.rationale: FrameStrip lets users delete and regenerate a single bad frame; pragmatic answer to Gemini not being frame-perfect.

nodes.label: Preset Action Library
nodes.rationale: Reliable core idle/walk/run; best-effort attack/jump. Adding a preset = adding table rows, no new code.

nodes.label: Filesystem Project Storage
nodes.rationale: Plain filesystem, no database; each project is ./projects/<uuid>/ with project.json manifest.

nodes.label: Deterministic vs Non-Deterministic Testing Split
nodes.rationale: Everything deterministic tested exhaustively and for free; the single non-deterministic seam is mocked in CI and smoke-tested by hand.

nodes.label: Configurable Gemini Model Selection
nodes.rationale: GEMINI_MODEL_EDIT must stay on full Flash Image because Lite is not optimized for multiple reference inputs; Stage 1 can optionally use Lite as a cost lever.

nodes.label: Python Imaging Stack Tradeoff
nodes.rationale: Two-language split means two dev servers vs all-JS Next.js, but Python Pillow/NumPy/rembg imaging ecosystem is worth it for a local personal tool.

nodes.label: Locked Guiding Decisions
nodes.rationale: Learning/personal tool; Gemini + local post-processing; animated sprite in 2 stages; pixel and hi-res; React+Vite and FastAPI; small preset library.

nodes.label: Sprite Game Asset Tool Implementation Plan
nodes.norm_label: sprite game asset tool implementation plan

nodes.label: TDD Implementation Approach
nodes.rationale: Deterministic pipeline tested exhaustively against committed fixtures; Gemini seam mocked in CI and smoke-tested by hand.

nodes.label: Pipeline Purity Convention
nodes.rationale: Every pipeline/* function is Image→Image or [Image]→Image with no network, disk, or config reads; primary test surface.

nodes.label: Seam Dependency Injection
nodes.rationale: rembg and Gemini SDK client are injected so tests substitute fakes.

nodes.label: google-genai SDK Call Shape
nodes.rationale: No Interactions API; both generation and editing use client.models.generate_content with response_modalities IMAGE, isolated to gemini_client.py.

nodes.label: Global Region Model Risk Resolution
nodes.rationale: gemini-3.1-flash-image 404s at us-central1; Gemini 3.x image models serve from global endpoint. Default region now global.

nodes.label: Partial Animation Failure Tolerance
nodes.rationale: One failed frame returns status failed with placeholder while other frames succeed; successful frames never lost.

nodes.label: Background removal wrapper.  The heavy ``rembg`` session is injected so unit tes
nodes.norm_label: background removal wrapper.  the heavy ``rembg`` session is injected so unit tes

nodes.norm_label: small deterministic fallback so edit availability is independently probed.

nodes.label: MCP tools/list Audit Distinction
nodes.rationale: When auditing an MCP-backed product, distinguish tools exported directly by the MCP server from tools available internally to remote agents; absence from tools/list does not prove the product lacks that capability.

nodes.label: Live Gemini Model Validation
nodes.rationale: Manual disposable acceptance check outside pytest/CI; billable live calls; no retries; redacts project ID; writes to scripts/live_validation_out/.

nodes.label: Supported Whole-App Location global
nodes.rationale: Image models are global-only; text may use us/eu for PayGo, but us/eu makes the configured image model unsupported; whole-app intersection is therefore global.

nodes.label: Manual Output-Quality Rubric
nodes.rationale: Score 0/1/2 per criterion; pass requires mean >= 1.5 and no critical criterion scored 0; covers prompt enhancement, base sprite, and edited-frame criteria.

nodes.label: Opt-in Safety Block Probe
nodes.rationale: Opt-in so normal smoke never sends policy-boundary content; expects provider safety block and discards returned image data.

nodes.label: Burst Quota Recovery Finding
nodes.rationale: 2026-07-21 run hit burst-quota after two immediate image edits; with 15s quota cooldown and pose-reference inputs, four-frame walk completed 4/4 in 146.6s — validates recovery, not production capacity.

nodes.label: Azure GPT Image 2 Acceptance Snapshot
nodes.rationale: Same manual rubric; identity and pose as two ordered image[] inputs; /openai/v1/images/edits?api-version=preview; three concurrent edits; serial rembg/align/quantize.

nodes.label: Hyperagent Not Listed as Supported
nodes.rationale: Authenticated MCP exports agent/thread orchestration but no direct image tool; no image-enabled agent from list_agents; remains experimental until dedicated sprite agent path is validated.

nodes.label: MCP After Transport-Neutral Service Extraction
nodes.rationale: MCP fits after route workflows are extracted into transport-neutral services shared by FastAPI and MCP, with project locking and atomic persistence.

nodes.label: Stage 1 route tests: /generate, /export, projects list/delete (fake Gemini).
nodes.norm_label: stage 1 route tests: /generate, /export, projects list/delete (fake gemini).

nodes.label: Returns a sprite: opaque disk on a solid (removable) background, with margins.
nodes.norm_label: returns a sprite: opaque disk on a solid (removable) background, with margins.

nodes.label: Green-screen remover: makes pure-green pixels transparent.
nodes.norm_label: green-screen remover: makes pure-green pixels transparent.

nodes.label: Audit installed Python and locked npm runtime dependency licenses.  The checker
nodes.norm_label: audit installed python and locked npm runtime dependency licenses.  the checker

nodes.label: The installed metadata needed by the pure Python audit.
nodes.norm_label: the installed metadata needed by the pure python audit.

nodes.label: Raised when dependency metadata cannot be audited safely.
nodes.norm_label: raised when dependency metadata cannot be audited safely.

nodes.label: Classify a declared license using a conservative offline allowlist.
nodes.norm_label: classify a declared license using a conservative offline allowlist.

nodes.label: Read installed distributions without accessing package source paths.
nodes.norm_label: read installed distributions without accessing package source paths.

nodes.label: Audit the installed runtime closure rooted at the project distribution.
nodes.norm_label: audit the installed runtime closure rooted at the project distribution.

nodes.label: Audit non-dev package entries from an npm lockfile v3 document.
nodes.norm_label: audit non-dev package entries from an npm lockfile v3 document.

nodes.label: Apply only exact, reasoned exceptions to otherwise blocked results.
nodes.norm_label: apply only exact, reasoned exceptions to otherwise blocked results.

nodes.label: Render a stable report containing package identifiers and categories only.
nodes.norm_label: render a stable report containing package identifiers and categories only.

nodes.label: Credential-safe local readiness checks for SpriteGameGen.
nodes.norm_label: credential-safe local readiness checks for spritegamegen.

nodes.label: Locate the repository from this script, never from the process CWD.
nodes.norm_label: locate the repository from this script, never from the process cwd.

nodes.label: Evaluate readiness using only injected, deterministic probes.
nodes.norm_label: evaluate readiness using only injected, deterministic probes.

nodes.label: Probe project storage and clean every temporary artifact before returning.
nodes.norm_label: probe project storage and clean every temporary artifact before returning.

nodes.label: Render only fixed labels and safe states; never configuration values.
nodes.norm_label: render only fixed labels and safe states; never configuration values.

nodes.label: Create generated Godot resources and verify them with pinned headless Godot.
nodes.norm_label: create generated godot resources and verify them with pinned headless godot.

nodes.label: Exercise the installed sprite-mcp stdio entrypoint without cloud credentials.
nodes.norm_label: exercise the installed sprite-mcp stdio entrypoint without cloud credentials.

nodes.label: Manual, opt-in ComfyUI configuration and quality validation harness.
nodes.norm_label: manual, opt-in comfyui configuration and quality validation harness.

nodes.label: Blank Issues Disabled
nodes.rationale: Forces contributors to use structured issue templates rather than unstructured blank issues.

nodes.label: Provider Output vs Deterministic Pipeline Distinction
nodes.rationale: Output can vary across generative model runs; reporters must distinguish provider output from deterministic pipeline behavior when filing quality issues.
nodes.norm_label: provider output vs deterministic pipeline distinction

nodes.label: Credential Safety
nodes.rationale: Provider integrations must preserve credential safety; never paste credentials in issue reports.

nodes.label: Explicit Billing Behavior
nodes.rationale: Provider integrations must document paid operations, rate limits, and which operations may incur provider charges.

nodes.label: Deterministic Credential-free Tests
nodes.rationale: Automated tests must remain deterministic and credential-free; live validation is opt-in only.

nodes.label: Clear Capability Boundaries
nodes.rationale: Provider integrations must define clear capability boundaries including provider selection, fallback behavior, and persisted provider identity.

nodes.label: Credential Review Checklist
nodes.rationale: PR authors must review diffs for API keys, tokens, service-account files, private endpoints, and personal data before submission.

nodes.label: No Live Provider Calls in Automated Tests
nodes.rationale: Automated tests must not make paid or live provider calls.
nodes.norm_label: no live provider calls in automated tests

nodes.label: smoke_mcp.py
nodes.source_location: Smoke test MCP stdio contract step

nodes.label: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct v2.1
nodes.norm_label: contributor covenant code of conduct v2.1

nodes.label: Deterministic Backend Tests
nodes.rationale: Backend tests must be deterministic and must not make paid provider calls; external services like Azure OpenAI and Gemini must be mocked.

nodes.label: Credential and Provider Safety
nodes.rationale: Never commit .env files, service-account JSON, API keys, or tokens; live smoke tests are opt-in and must not be added to default CI without agreement.

nodes.label: Auto Provider Selection
nodes.rationale: Auto prefers Azure when configured, then Gemini, then ComfyUI during initial generation; resolved provider is persisted and animate/regenerate_frame always use the stored provider.

nodes.label: Private Vulnerability Reporting via GitHub Advisories
nodes.norm_label: private vulnerability reporting via github advisories

nodes.label: Strict Data-only Action Packs
nodes.rationale: Action-pack V1 files are strict JSON data; SpriteGameGen does not recurse, follow symlinks, import modules, execute code, or access pack-supplied paths/URLs.

nodes.label: Credential-free Recipe V1
nodes.rationale: Recipe V1 is strict credential-free JSON that records generation context but never endpoints, credentials, environment dumps, or arbitrary paths.

nodes.label: sprite-character-bundle V1
nodes.rationale: Deterministic ZIP format for engine-ready character exports; excludes prompts, credentials, endpoints, environment values, and absolute paths.

nodes.label: bottom-center pivot (0.5, 1.0)
nodes.rationale: Default pivot for character bundles; frame indices remain canonical clip indices when disabled frames are omitted.

nodes.label: bundle export scope validation
nodes.rationale: active/one scope validates only its selected clip; all_enabled validates every enabled clip before writing.

nodes.label: Godot headless import/load smoke gate
nodes.rationale: Godot support must not be claimed by a release until the pinned headless import/load smoke passes.

nodes.label: loopback-only network boundary
nodes.rationale: Permits only localhost, 127.0.0.0/8, or ::1 with explicit port; HTTP environment proxies and redirects disabled; API/MCP callers cannot provide URLs, workflow bodies, node IDs, model names, or filesystem paths.

nodes.label: capability preflight rejection
nodes.rationale: Generation, identity edit, pose reference, and seed are preflighted; unsupported inputs are rejected rather than ignored.

nodes.label: safe cancellation policy
nodes.rationale: Cancellation may delete only queued prompt IDs submitted by this process; global /interrupt endpoint is never used.

nodes.label: manual cloud-provider ComfyUI Godot gates
nodes.rationale: Run manual cloud-provider, ComfyUI, and Godot gates only for capabilities claimed by the release; never put credentials in release artifacts or logs.

nodes.label: rollback without schema downgrade
nodes.rationale: Rollback retains previous tag and artifacts; never rewrite persisted projects to an older schema.

nodes.label: Filesystem project manifest V2
nodes.rationale: V1 is migrated in memory; the first successful mutation writes V2. Future versions are rejected, never downgraded.

nodes.label: Character bundle V1
nodes.rationale: Readers must reject unsupported versions. Bundle V1 remains deterministic.

nodes.label: Action pack V1
nodes.rationale: Strict data-only JSON; unknown fields and versions are rejected.

nodes.label: Recipe V1
nodes.rationale: Credential-free strict JSON; runners preflight the complete recipe before provider work.

nodes.label: Batch state V1
nodes.rationale: Atomic locked state; changed recipe digests are rejected.

nodes.label: independent format versioning
nodes.rationale: Application code and every persisted or exchanged format evolve independently; a package release does not implicitly change a data format.

nodes.label: HTTP/MCP compatibility projections
nodes.rationale: Compatibility projections in HTTP and MCP are transport adapters and are not dual-written into the V2 manifest.

nodes.label: local-first character animation workbench
nodes.rationale: Local-first character animation workbench for deterministic sprite repair and engine-ready exports.

nodes.label: ProjectStore
nodes.rationale: Filesystem persistence hub (deg 77) bridging routes via get_store and MCP via _default_service; AppContext edge is indirect.

nodes.label: SpriteService
nodes.rationale: Framework-neutral core (deg 68) shared by FastAPI and MCP AppContext.

nodes.label: GeminiClient
nodes.rationale: Wired by get_gemini_client and build_default_client; bridges deps, routes, and live validation.

nodes.label: ViewMode
nodes.rationale: Enum over-connected to AppContext MCP DTOs errors and fakes in graph; canonical model node only.

nodes.label: Style
nodes.rationale: Enum over-connected to AppContext MCP DTOs errors and fakes in graph; canonical model node only.

nodes.label: _edit_frame()
nodes.rationale: For walk+side_scroller: calls walk_pose_reference, appends pose-only prompt text, then image_provider.edit with pose_reference guide.

nodes.label: walk_pose_reference()
nodes.rationale: Generates 8-phase stick skeleton pose guides; LEFT mirrors RIGHT.

nodes.label: frame_prompt()
nodes.rationale: Builds POSE GOAL + change_directive + frame i of n + camera from PRESETS; walk uses 8 _WALK_PHASES and _WALK_POSE_CHANGE with same phase index formula as walk_pose_reference.

nodes.label: partial failure concurrency in animate
nodes.rationale: Concurrency only on provider.edit via ThreadPoolExecutor; failures mark FrameStatus.FAILED without aborting siblings; shared_bbox failure fails all ok frames.

nodes.label: export_sheet()
nodes.rationale: Counts FrameStatus.FAILED and raises ProjectUnavailableError HTTP 409 before packing; empty OK set is ValidationServiceError 422.

nodes.label: regenerate_frame()
nodes.rationale: Requires project.action; rebuilds frame_prompt and _edit_frame from persisted action, view_mode, direction and len(frames); request body is only project_id+index.

nodes.label: Canonical Manifest V2
nodes.rationale: Only broad persistence migration; reads migrate old manifests in memory; first successful mutation writes V2 atomically; unsupported future schemas never downgraded.

nodes.label: source and rendered asset separation
nodes.rationale: Every quality change renders from source_* assets; legacy projects bootstrap source from current PNG only on first deterministic mutation.

nodes.label: ComfyUI loopback-only boundary
nodes.rationale: Phase 5 locked decision: permit only localhost, 127.0.0.0/8, or ::1; disable proxies and redirects; never use global /interrupt.

nodes.label: ComfyUI promotion gates
nodes.rationale: Live generation, identity edit, and pose acceptance must pass before respective capability support claims.
